description: Use this API to return zone totals. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr, cmpval = zndat(iar, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the zone total desired. (input).

string.description: Total zone load by bus zone assignment (net of load plus in-service distributed generation on load feeder).
Total zone load by load zone assignment.
Total distributed generation on load feeder by bus zone assignment.
Total distributed generation on load feeder by load zone assignment.
Total zone losses; I**2 * (R + jX) for ac branches with non-metered end in the zone.
Magnetizing admittance powers for transformers with winding 1 bus in the zone.
Powers flowing into line shunts of non-transformer branches with non-metered end in the zone.
Powers flowing from line charging of non-transformer branches with non-metered end in the zone.
Total zone induction machine powers by bus zone assignment.
Total zone induction machine powers by machine zone assignment.
Total zone induction generator powers by bus zone assignment.
Total zone induction generator powers by machine zone assignment.
Total zone induction motor powers by bus zone assignment.
Total zone induction motor powers by machine zone assignment.

error_codes.description: Zone number < 0 or > largest allowable zone number; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.

No in-service buses with in-service loads (for ‘LOAD’), no in-service loads (for ‘LOADLD’), no type 2 or type 3 buses (for ‘GEN’), no branches (for LOSS’), or no ties (for ‘INT’) in zone; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
Zone not found; ‘P’ and ‘Q’ or ‘CMPVAL’ unchanged.
